name: Structural Strategy
description: Strategic planning for digital systems, content structures, and website architecture built for long-term scalability, governance, and growth.

name: Digital Platform Engineering
description: Engineering of scalable, maintainable, and performance-led digital platforms designed to support modern business operations and future development.

name: Machine Legibility (AIDI Layer)
description: A structured machine-readable layer that helps digital platforms expose clear entities, relationships, and AI-ready outputs for search, discovery, and system interoperability.
